skills.account_setup: Sign up at exa.ai, generate API key from dashboard
skills.live_test_command: EXA_API_KEY=$EXA_API_KEY uv run python -c "from openjarvis.skills.ecc_completion import live_test_skill; live_test_skill('exa-search')"
skills.activation_route: Set EXA_API_KEY env var, then call catalog.get('ecc:exa-search') → update state to active
skills.rollback_path: Unset EXA_API_KEY; skill auto-disables via key presence check

skills.account_setup: Sign up at fal.ai, generate API key from dashboard
skills.live_test_command: FAL_API_KEY=$FAL_API_KEY uv run python -c "from openjarvis.skills.ecc_completion import live_test_skill; live_test_skill('fal-ai-media')"
skills.activation_route: Set FAL_API_KEY env var, enable skill in catalog

skills.account_setup: Exa.ai account required; optional Perplexity account for deeper research
skills.live_test_command: EXA_API_KEY=$EXA_API_KEY uv run python -c "from openjarvis.skills.ecc_completion import live_test_skill; live_test_skill('deep-research')"
skills.activation_route: Set EXA_API_KEY; skill becomes active

skills.account_setup: Exa.ai account; optional SerpAPI account (serpapi.com)
skills.live_test_command: EXA_API_KEY=$EXA_API_KEY uv run python -c "from openjarvis.skills.ecc_completion import live_test_skill; live_test_skill('market-research')"
skills.activation_route: Set EXA_API_KEY; enable skill

skills.account_setup: ScrapingBee account at scrapingbee.com; or BrightData account
skills.live_test_command: SCRAPING_BEE_API_KEY=$SCRAPING_BEE_API_KEY uv run python -c "from openjarvis.skills.ecc_completion import live_test_skill; live_test_skill('data-scraper-agent')"
skills.activation_route: Set SCRAPING_BEE_API_KEY; enable skill

skills.account_setup: Twitter Developer account (developer.twitter.com), LinkedIn app, Meta Business account
skills.live_test_command: uv run python -c "from openjarvis.skills.ecc_completion import live_test_skill; live_test_skill('social-publisher')"
skills.activation_route: Set social API keys; enable skill with dry_run=True first
skills.rollback_path: Unset social API keys; disable skill

skills.account_setup: One of: SMTP credentials, Resend account (resend.com), or SendGrid account
skills.exact_blocker: Missing email provider credentials (SMTP or RESEND_API_KEY or SENDGRID_API_KEY)
skills.live_test_command: RESEND_API_KEY=$RESEND_API_KEY EMAIL_FROM=$EMAIL_FROM uv run python -c "from openjarvis.skills.ecc_completion import live_test_skill; live_test_skill('email-ops')"
skills.activation_route: Set email provider keys; enable skill with dry_run=True first

skills.account_setup: GitHub account; generate Personal Access Token or GitHub App token with write scopes
skills.live_test_command: GITHUB_TOKEN=$GITHUB_TOKEN uv run python -c "from openjarvis.skills.ecc_completion import live_test_skill; live_test_skill('github-ops')"
skills.activation_route: Set GITHUB_TOKEN; enable skill with read_only=True first
skills.rollback_path: Unset GITHUB_TOKEN; revoke token if needed

skills.account_setup: Jira account; generate API token at id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens
skills.live_test_command: JIRA_API_TOKEN=$JIRA_API_TOKEN JIRA_BASE_URL=$JIRA_BASE_URL JIRA_EMAIL=$JIRA_EMAIL uv run python -c "from openjarvis.skills.ecc_completion import live_test_skill; live_test_skill('jira-integration')"
skills.activation_route: Set Jira env vars; enable skill

skills.account_setup: Google Cloud Console project; OAuth 2.0 credentials; complete consent screen; obtain refresh token
skills.exact_blocker: Missing GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID + GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET + GOOGLE_REFRESH_TOKEN + OAuth browser consent
skills.live_test_command: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=$GC_ID GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=$GC_SECRET GOOGLE_REFRESH_TOKEN=$GC_RT uv run python -c "from openjarvis.skills.ecc_completion import live_test_skill; live_test_skill('google-workspace-ops')"
skills.activation_route: Set Google env vars; requires OAuth browser flow to obtain refresh token
impossible_even_with_keys: Requires OAuth browser consent screen — cannot automate without browser access

skills.account_setup: Slack workspace → create app at api.slack.com; or Telegram BotFather; or Discord Developer Portal
skills.live_test_command: SLACK_BOT_TOKEN=$SLACK_BOT_TOKEN uv run python -c "from openjarvis.skills.ecc_completion import live_test_skill; live_test_skill('messages-ops')"
skills.activation_route: Set SLACK_BOT_TOKEN; enable skill with dry_run=True first
skills.rollback_path: Revoke bot token from Slack app settings

skills.account_setup: X Developer account at developer.twitter.com; create app; apply for elevated access for write
skills.live_test_command: X_API_KEY=$X_API_KEY X_API_SECRET=$X_API_SECRET X_ACCESS_TOKEN=$X_AT X_ACCESS_TOKEN_SECRET=$X_ATS uv run python -c "from openjarvis.skills.ecc_completion import live_test_skill; live_test_skill('x-api')"
skills.activation_route: Set all X env vars; enable skill with dry_run=True
skills.rollback_path: Revoke access token from X Developer Portal

skills.account_setup: Set NOTIFICATION_PROVIDER=slack|telegram|email|pagerduty; provide corresponding key
skills.live_test_command: NOTIFICATION_PROVIDER=slack SLACK_BOT_TOKEN=$SLACK_BOT_TOKEN uv run python -c "from openjarvis.skills.ecc_completion import live_test_skill; live_test_skill('unified-notifications-ops')"
skills.activation_route: Set NOTIFICATION_PROVIDER + matching key; enable skill

skills.account_setup: Apollo.io account at apollo.io; generate API key from settings

skills.activation_route: Set APOLLO_API_KEY; enable skill

skills.account_setup: GitHub PAT with write access to ECC config repo (affaan-m/ECC or Bryan's fork)

skills.activation_route: Set GITHUB_TOKEN with write scopes; enable skill
skills.rollback_path: Revoke token; revert ECC config changes via git revert

skills.account_setup: X402 protocol account; or Stripe account with payment intents enabled
skills.exact_blocker: Missing X402_PAYMENT_KEY; financial risk requires Bryan's explicit approval
skills.live_test_command: X402_PAYMENT_KEY=$X402_PAYMENT_KEY uv run python -c "from openjarvis.skills.ecc_completion import live_test_skill; live_test_skill('agent-payment-x402')"
skills.activation_route: Set X402_PAYMENT_KEY + Bryan explicit approval + dry_run test first
skills.rollback_path: Revoke X402 payment key; disable skill immediately
impossible_even_with_keys: Financial risk — requires Bryan explicit approval even with keys

skills.account_setup: Stripe account at stripe.com; generate API keys from Dashboard → Developers → API Keys
skills.exact_blocker: Missing STRIPE_API_KEY + STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET; financial risk requires Bryan approval
skills.live_test_command: STRIPE_API_KEY=$STRIPE_API_KEY uv run python -c "from openjarvis.skills.ecc_completion import live_test_skill; live_test_skill('stripe-integration')"
skills.activation_route: Set STRIPE_API_KEY + STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET; use test mode first (sk_test_...)
skills.rollback_path: Delete webhook; revoke API key from Stripe dashboard
impossible_even_with_keys: Financial risk — use Stripe test mode keys first (sk_test_...)

prompt2_inputs: EXA_API_KEY — for exa-search, deep-research, market-research, research-ops, brand-discovery, competitive-platform-analysis, competitive-report-structure
GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID + GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET + GOOGLE_REFRESH_TOKEN — for google-workspace-ops (requires OAuth browser flow)
X_API_KEY + X_API_SECRET + X_ACCESS_TOKEN + X_ACCESS_TOKEN_SECRET — for x-api, social-publisher, crosspost
STRIPE_API_KEY + STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET (use sk_test_... first) — for stripe-integration
RESEND_API_KEY + EMAIL_FROM — for email-ops, investor-outreach, marketing-campaign
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY — for ecc-tools-cost-audit (or OPENROUTER_API_KEY if already set)
X402_PAYMENT_KEY + Bryan approval — for agent-payment-x402 (financial risk)
Bryan approval — for all 11 planning/review agents (after Jarvis routing wired)
